programme.desc: When Montu learns that Manav and Meher have been bitten by 'mayavi bhavre', he makes every effort to awaken them.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Daityani Pari goes to drink water from a particular well in order to regain her lost strength. Meanwhile, Baalveer and Baalpari lock the doors of the well using magic.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An unfortunate situation occurs when Daya and Jethalal reach Ahmedabad and Sunder lands in Gokuldham Society to meet Daya.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After much struggle and delay, Daya and Sunder finally meet and are able to celebrate Raksha Bandhan together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sunder takes Jethalal and Daya out for a special meal. Later, Jethalal is impressed but he still finds it suspicious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal decides to finally come clean with his potential bride and tell her everything honestly without knowing how she would react.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The inhabitants of Gokuldham Society are worried about Popatlal after Madhubala makes her decision regarding marrying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhubala, along with her family, meets Popatlal and his friends in order to finally reveal her decision about marrying him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The entirety of the Gokuldham colony is bursting with happiness and excitement as they make preparations for Popatlal's engagement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal struggles to try and keep his nerves in check as he is very excited but also anxious about his engagement ceremony and hopes that the day goes without a hitch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is overjoyed and excited at Popatlal's engagement ceremony as he hopes that the day goes as planned without a hitch.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal's engagement ceremony is just around the corner and everybody is eagerly waiting to welcome his beautiful bride to the family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Popatlal is nowhere to be found on the day of his engagement, Inspector Pandey holds the members of the Gokuldham colony responsible for his disappearance.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is left heartbroken when Dr. Hathi informs him that both he and Madhubala are carriers for a rare genetic disorder. The doctor warns that their children could develop serious health issues.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena is eager to celebrate with the colony as they return from Pune with their award. But, they are not sure how to approach Popatlal as he may still be upset about his cancelled wedding.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In order to connect with each other and share a few laughs, the women of Gokuldham colony organise and attend a kitty party.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A young couple finds a woman's dead body in a bathing tub. When the CID team investigates the matter, they discover that she was drowned to death in a chocolate tub.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Things get intense as Babli arrives for the intriguing challenge. Later, Popatlal gears up and meets Babli as the competition begins.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: During the competition, Babli constantly cuts the kites of her competitors. Meanwhile, Popatlal holds off from entering the contest until 4:00 p.m.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Amidst a fierce kite-flying duel, Babli and Popatlal's rivalry reaches new heights as they skilfully manoeuvre to sever each other's kites.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide embarrasses himself in front of the ladies of Gokuldham. Later, Daya asks Jethalal to help her with ideas for the party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the ladies have fun when Daya hosts a tea party for them at her house. Later, Anjali narrates the story of her and Taarak's initial meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Gada Electronics, Jethalal gets annoyed with Bagha's clumsiness. Later, Taarak and Anjali share a romantic moment.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham want their husbands to write poetry for them. However, the husbands are a bit taken aback by the request.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Yashoda prepares Neel Mani for his Shashthi pooja. Meanwhile, Kansa decides to enlist Bhootna's help to find and put an end to Vishnu's avatar.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Mithun Chakraborty arrives as the guest judge to inspire the contestants before the final. Later, the judges witness some dazzling performances.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide agrees to take Champaklal out to attend his friend's birthday. However, things take a drastic turn when Champaklal goes missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal finds himself in trouble after realising that he has been kidnapped. He defends himself when the thief tries to steal his gold chain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal becomes angry when Bhide reluctantly tells him that Champaklal has disappeared with his scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Madhavi surprises Bhide with a welcome, and they discuss Gogi's situation. Tarak tells Anjali about Gogi confidently going to his exam.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak and Jethalal discuss saving water and diet food. A mysterious car appears in their community, but no one knows the owner.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A decorated car in the Gokuldham Society surprises all the members. Iyer tells a story about the car and his love for Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is stunned at seeing an expensive car in Gokuldham. However, Iyer reveals the truth, telling the story of his and Babita's love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal has doubts about Iyer and Babita's marriage since they are from different backgrounds, and he tries to find out how Iyer asked Babita to marry him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Maushami, a childhood friend, calls Babita after the marriage proposal and comes to visit her. Iyer talks to Babita about a significant presentation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Iyer talks to Babita on the phone, Babita forgets to hang up the call and Iyer hears the unexpected truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Iyer continues to make a big deal about Jethalal's misconception, Jethalal asks Taarak Mehta for help. However, when Taarak Mehta refuses to help him, Jethalal vows to exact revenge on Iyer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide gets a swing fixed in his balcony, the plaster comes off. He informs the residents that the building would soon require repairing, but they all refuse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the plaster in Popatlal's balcony comes off, everybody agrees with Bhide that the building requires repairing. Bhide calls Lalita Godbole, an engineer, to inspect the building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Lalita Godbole, an engineer, comes to inspect the building, Popatlal forces her to inspect his house first. Soon, an argument erupts in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After inspecting the building, Lalita Godbole informs Bhide that the building is in dire condition and requires immediate repair. Soon, Bhide calls an urgent meeting to break this news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Lalita Godbole presents the structural report and informs the residents that the external section of the building requires repairing. An argument between Popatlal and Bhide turns into a big fight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal finds out about Popatlal's real problem and helps him with some money. Later, without Bhide's permission, Popatlal places an ad in the Toofan Express.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide calls a meeting to declare the name of the building contractor. However, a girl interrupts and requests Bhide to consider her contract.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar's company wins the repairing contractor. Later, Jethalal is shocked to uncover that Sundar started a construction company.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Sundar gets the building repair contract, Jethalal worries and reaches Taarak's house to discuss the issue. Soon, the duo visit an astrologer to find a solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal calls Sundar and tries to scare him by pretending to be an inspector, but Sundar recognises his voice and pranks Jethalal instead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the prayer rituals, the members of Gokuldham Society ask Sundar to start the renovation at the earliest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and the entire family go to the theatre to watch the movie in which Sundar acted.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society's members decide to donate blankets to those in need. However, when the blankets arrive they receive a shocking surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal feels enraged when the people in need resell the blankets that he donated to them. However, he eventually learns the truth behind their actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal learns that Champaklal took his money from the shop just before he has to pay a dealer. The police arrest Champaklal when they mistake him for a thief.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Taarak are surprised to learn that Champaklal has disappeared. Tapu explains the circumstances around him going missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham is surprised to learn that Champaklal has been arrested. The members rush to the police station to free him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone's attempts to free Champaklal continue to fail. The real perpetrator decides to confesses his crime to the police.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal learns that Baagha and Nattu Kaka will be going to meet Chheda without telling him. Taarak Mehta receives a distress phone call.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Taarak for suggestions after facing problems with Baagha and Nattu Kaka. Anjali feels surprised to see that Taarak has come home early.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky neighbours who laugh, fight, and come together through every challenge. A mix of comedy, emotion, and strong community spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his wife are excitedly packing for Ratnagiri. Meanwhile, Tapu misses a call from Sona, who later calls Goli to say she is coming back in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena try to stop Bhide and Madhvi before they leave for Ratnagiri as Sonu is coming back to Gokuldham in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and Abdul attempt to stop Bhide from leaving by lying about police officers coming here. Consequently, Madhavi talks to Bhide about him quitting the job.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents rest easy after Champak Chacha's plan works. However, Bhide still does not give up and everyone has to come up with more reasons to stop him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Hathi examines Bhide to check if he has rested well as a plan to stall him. Later, Bhide is late for his trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal pretends to be a thief and steals Bhide's luggage. However, Bhide and his wife still insist on going to surprise Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A bus blocks Bhide's car as Sonu makes a surprise appearance with a group of dancers. Meanwhile, Bhide realises that the residents have been working with Tapu Sena to stop him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and Tapu help Jethalal fix the button of his shirt. Meanwhile, Bhide and Popatlal get into a fight with each other.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champak Chacha resolves the fight over Suvichar between Bhide and Popatlal. Later, Bhide goes to Sonu's college to give her food, but Sonu is not there.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After not seeing Sonu at college, Bhide learns from Goli that Sonu and Tapu are hanging out together, making him angry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: To follow Sonu and Tapu to the theatre, Bhide takes Jethalal for a movie. After they arrive at the theatre, they try to find their kids but end up failing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Madhvi is about to throw Bhide's tape recorder out of the house, he intervenes. Bhide goes on to explain the importance of the tape recorder in his life.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tasks Bagha with the responsibility of fixing Bhide's tape recorder, but things take an unexpected turn as Bagha drops the tape recorder on the floor and damages it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is furious to see Iyer badmouthing him in front of the whole society and lashes out at Iyer for his actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer makes all of Gokuldham's men gather at the soda shop to discuss how Babita is not happy to be with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita tries to contact Iyer to ask about his presentation, but Iyer ignores her calls. He drinks at the bar to ease his heartbreak.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer's friends try to find Iyer at the bar so that they can take him home. However, getting Iyer to go home is a difficult task.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer's friends attempt to take the drunken Iyer home safely without the rest of the society noticing. They relay a message to Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal lets Iyer stay at his place and takes care of him. Popatlal is frustrated with Iyer's behaviour and asks Jethalal for advice.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the early morning, the men of Gokuldham go on a walk to discuss how they should handle Iyer's problematic condition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer believes that Babita is not in love with him after they meet face-to-face; Iyer's friends stay put at Popatlal's house and wait for Iyer's explanation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The regular newspaper vendor of Gokuldham Society commits a humorous mistake by giving Sodhi a Marathi paper and Bhide a Punjabi one. This leads to the two families eating together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha panics when he realises that the keys to the shop's locker are in Bawree's house. Jethalal learns about this and harshly scolds him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide learns that Manoj, a customer of Madhvi's products, has not paid his money in six months and decides to go to his house and confront him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After taking Manoj's payment, Bhide encounters a drunk man while returning home. The stranger keeps calling for an autorickshaw that is not there.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide saves the life of the drunk man on the road, who gives him a briefcase full of gold in return. Bhide takes it in shock and returns home in haste.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide brings the briefcase full of gold to Gokuldham in secret. He does not know what to do with it and decides to get help from his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide gets nervous when he learns the exact value of the gold in the briefcase and asks the residents of Gokuldham what he should do with it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While sleeping, Bhide has a bad dream in which robbers steal the gold from Jethalal at gunpoint. He wakes up in a panic and runs to Jethalal's house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dhanraj, the jeweller who Bhide previously encountered, goes to the police to report his missing gold bars. The inspector starts his investigation by trying to find Dhanraj's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police come to Gokuldham Society and arrest Bhide for allegedly stealing the gold bars. They question his friends and assume they are a gang of robbers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police refuse to believe Bhide's story of Dhanraj giving him the gold while drunk. Dhanraj hears this and asks him why he did not hand the gold over to the police if his story was true.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The judge rules in Dhanraj's favour and Bhide is put in jail for stealing the gold. However, the Gokuldham residents come up with a plan to get him out of prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal disguises himself as a gold businessman from Jodhpur and meets Dhanraj as part of the Gokuldham residents' plan to get Bhide out of jail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham execute their plan to trap Dhanraj Seth in order to prove Bhide's innocence and get him out of prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and his friends recreate the scenario in which Dhanraj gave Bhide the gold to convince the police to release him from jail.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham manage to get sufficient proof to get Bhide out of jail. However, Dhanraj has his own evidence at hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham fail to convince Inspector Chalu Pandey to release Bhide. Jethalal ends up joining him in prison.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide's arrests shock everyone in Gokuldham. Daya comes up with a plan win the taxi driver's support.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and all of his friends are inside the lockup on allegations of stealing the briefcase full of gold. However, the Mahila Mandal of Gokuldham Society have devised a plan to prove them innocent.
